ops.text: agent-browser 0.31.1 screenshot hangs indefinitely in this environment — every mode (headless/headed), format (png/jpeg), session, even a data: URL; 'connect <ws>' relaunches its own clark browser instead of attaching. snapshot/click/eval work; only pixel capture is dead. Workaround that unblocked E2E QA: launch stock Chrome headless with --remote-debugging-port and drive Page.captureScreenshot via a direct CDP script (nav/shot/key/click/type/drag/eval/viewport/media all fine) so interaction and screenshots share one browser.
